name: Stratabound Minerals Corp.
summary: Stratabound Minerals Corp. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral resource properties in North America. The company primarily explores for lead, zinc, silver, copper, gold, and cobalt deposits. Its flagship project is the Golden Culvert property that covers an area of 84 square kilometers located in the southeast Yukon Territory; and McIntyre Brook Project, which is located in New Brunswick. Stratabound Minerals Corp. is based in Toronto, Canada.
